name: HRFlow Recruitment Agent
description: Handles all recruitment and hiring workflows: resume screening, candidate ranking, interview scheduling, and decision communication.

skills.name: Screen Resume
skills.description: Rate a candidate resume 1-100 against job requirements.

skills.name: Rank Candidates
skills.description: Get sorted list of candidates by match score for a job role.

skills.name: Schedule Interview
skills.description: Book an interview slot between a candidate and interviewer.

skills.name: Send Decision
skills.description: Send offer or rejection notification to a candidate.

skills.name: Get Application Status
skills.description: Check current status of a job application.
